---
title: "Draft Quarto document"
author: "Your Name"
format: html
---

## Header 1

```{r setup}
#| include: false
library(tidyverse)  
source(here::here("R/functions.R"))
```

```{r}
# Code chunk
```
## Prepare HR data 
```{r}
hr_data <- read_all("HR.csv.gz") %>%
  get_participant_id() %>%
  summarise_by_datetime()
```

## Prepare IBI data 
```{r}
ibi_data <- read_all("IBI.csv.gz") %>%
  get_participant_id() %>%
  summarise_by_datetime()
```
## Prepare TMEP data 
```{r}
temp_data <- read_all("TEMP.csv.gz") %>%
  get_participant_id() %>%
  summarise_by_datetime()
```

## Prepare BVP data 
```{r}
bvp_data <- read_all("BVP.csv.gz") %>%
  get_participant_id() %>%
  summarise_by_datetime()
```

## Prepare EDA data 
```{r}
eda_data <- read_all("EDA.csv.gz") %>%
  get_participant_id() %>%
  summarise_by_datetime()
```

## Process survey data 
```{r}
survey_tidy <- here::here("data-raw/nurses-stress/survey-results.csv.gz") |> 
  read() |> 
  tidy_survey_dates()
```
